positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest animal—a fox, a rabbit, and a owl—interacting playfully under a luminous full moon. The composition must be centrally arranged, forming a clean, readable silhouette against a deeply saturated twilight sky. The style should be a blend of Nordic folk art and contemporary pop art, utilizing thick, crisp linework and flat color blocking with watercolor accents. Color palette: deep sapphire blues, burnt orange, cream, and emerald green. Emphasize clean separation between subjects and background elements to ensure print scalability. Excellent symmetry and dynamic negative space.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, grainy, poor lighting, complex background, messy
